title: Manual LRU Cache
description: Implement an 'LRUCache' class with 'get(key)' and 'put(key, val)' methods. CAPACITY must be respected. Do NOT use @functools.lru_cache.
test_script:
import unittest
from lru import LRUCache
class TestLRU(unittest.TestCase):
    def test_eviction(self):
        c = LRUCache(2)
        c.put(1, 1); c.put(2, 2); c.get(1); c.put(3, 3)
        self.assertIsNone(c.get(2))
